imagefolder have the images which these glasses are sending to the backend. now all the images are  
 black and not proper. also script.cpp file have the ardurino code which i am using. i want to send  
 actual and well images to the roboflow which will provide me the response. pls update this code for  
 that

the flow i want is:

1- glasses will send images to the backend in every 2 minutes
2- backend will send to the image to the roboflow for analysis.
3- we will wait for roboflow for response and after the response we will take the latest image taken by the camera and send it to the backend
4- the response of roboflow will be like:
[
{
"distance_cm": 38.8457269700333,
"annotated_image": {
"type": "base64",
"value": "",
"video_metadata": {
"video_identifier": "image",
"frame_number": 0,
"frame_timestamp": "2026-04-05T16:34:17.738289",
"fps": 30,
"measured_fps": null,
"comes_from_video_file": null
}
},
"laptop_area": {
"image": {
"width": 2048,
"height": 1365
},
"predictions": [
{
"width": 901,
"height": 701,
"x": 1022.5,
"y": 714.5,
"confidence": 0.9588212370872498,
"class_id": 73,
"tracker_id": 1,
"class": "laptop",
"detection_id": "21a88414-0a1e-47dd-b2c5-915e1e577073",
"parent_id": "image",
"area_px": 631601,
"area_converted": 631601
}
]
}
}
]

distance will be in the response but we have to calculate the brightness using the width, height and position of the laptop and rest is environment.

also store every image in the images folder which is sent to roboflow
